title: ContextEntry
description: A single context annotation attached to a region of source code. This is the core data model for Kodela. All fields are required — no field may silently hold an invalid or absent state.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Must be '1.0.0' for this version of the schema. Readers must reject entries with unknown schema versions — never silently default.

id.description: Stable unique identifier (UUID v4). Never changes after creation, even if the entry is moved or the file is renamed.

filePath.description: Repository-relative file path. Uses forward slashes regardless of OS. Never includes '..' segments.

kind.description: The syntactic kind of the anchored AST node.

name.description: The name of the function, method, or class. Empty string for anonymous blocks.

blockHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the normalised AST node signature (name + parameter list). Used to re-locate the node after refactors.

oneOf.description: Null when AST anchoring is unavailable (e.g., non-parseable file types).

astAnchor.description: Primary location anchor. Resilient to line-number shifts caused by edits above the annotated region.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the normalised token stream for the annotated lines. Used as the secondary mapping layer when the AST anchor is unavailable or has changed.

start.description: 1-indexed start line number. Used as the fallback mapping layer.

end.description: 1-indexed end line number. Must be >= start.

note.description: The context annotation itself. Why this code was written, what decision was made, what the AI generated, etc. Required — never blank.

author.description: The person or system that created this entry (git username or system identifier).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this entry was created. Never modified after creation.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this entry was last updated (e.g., after a healing operation).

severity.description: Severity of the context entry. 'critical' entries block merges in enforcement mode.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and search (e.g., ['ai-generated', 'auth', 'security']).

source.description: Origin of the annotated code. 'ai' entries with reviewRequired=true require human sign-off before a branch can merge in enforcement mode.

confidence.description: Current mapping confidence score (0.0–1.0). Updated by the mapping engine on every heal operation. Never use this field without also checking 'status'.

status.description: Derived from confidence. 'mapped' (>0.85) means the engine is confident about the code location. 'uncertain' (0.5–0.85) triggers a UI warning. 'orphaned' (<0.5) requires human review. Never silently set to 'mapped' for uncertain data.

reviewRequired.description: Explicit review flag. Set to true for AI-generated code in security-sensitive paths, or whenever a human must sign off before merging.
